author: Behnam Ebrahimi
description: Ask AI questions about your current Obsidian note or selected text. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Behnam Ebrahimi
manifest.description: AI notes: Q&A, summaries, rewrites, workflows, safe Apply, images.
manifest.name: AskMate

name: AskMate

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Added Azure AI Foundry as a text provider.
- Added Azure AI Foundry provider settings, connection testing, and model info refresh.
- Documented the Azure AI Foundry `/models/chat/completions` endpoint.
- Bumped plugin version to 1.6.12.

## Validation

- bun run test
- bun run build
releases.name: AskMate 1.6.12

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Split provider-specific request, model refresh, and connection logic into `src/providers/`.
- Added one adapter file for each supported text provider.
- Added smoke-test coverage for the provider adapter folder.
- Bumped plugin version to 1.6.11.

## Validation

- bun run test
- bun run build
releases.name: AskMate 1.6.11

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Split the AskMate plugin source into a modular `src/` structure.
- Kept `main.ts` as the Obsidian build entrypoint.
- Updated roadmap smoke tests to validate the modular source tree.
- Bumped plugin version to 1.6.10.

## Validation

- bun run test
- bun run build
releases.name: AskMate 1.6.10

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Updated OpenAI model refresh to show every model ID returned by the OpenAI Models API.
- Added the Remotion demo project, generated demo video, and thumbnail assets.
- Added demo run scripts and smoke-test coverage for the model refresh behavior.
- Bumped plugin version to 1.6.9.

## Validation

- bun run test
- bun run build
releases.name: AskMate 1.6.9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

releases.name: AskMate 1.6.8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Removed direct system clipboard writes from AskMate copy-style actions.
- Replaced vault-wide Markdown enumeration with folder-scoped listing for batch and folder-context workflows.
- Added smoke-test guards for Obsidian review recommendations around clipboard access and vault enumeration.
- Bumped plugin version to 1.6.7.

## Validation

- bun run test
- bun run build
releases.name: AskMate 1.6.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Replaced vault-wide Markdown enumeration with folder-scoped listing for batch and folder-context workflows.

releases.name: AskMate 1.6.6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Fixed default Apply behavior so no-selection text Apply appends to the captured note instead of replacing existing note content.
- Preserved explicit full-note replacement behind the existing Apply preview, truncated-context warning, and frontmatter safeguards.
- Updated Apply documentation and smoke tests for the safer default append behavior.
- Bumped plugin version to 1.6.5.

## Validation

- bun run test
- bun run build
releases.name: AskMate 1.6.5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Added first-class Azure OpenAI text provider support.
- Added Azure OpenAI API-key auth, /openai/v1 endpoint validation, Test API behavior, and best-effort model refresh.
- Updated README provider docs and smoke tests for Azure OpenAI while keeping Azure AI Foundry planned.
- Bumped plugin version to 1.6.4.

## Validation

- bun run test
- bun run build
releases.name: AskMate 1.6.4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Reorganized AskMate settings into collapsible sections with category navigation.
- Added responsive settings styles for section cards, controls, focus states, and narrow sidebars.
- Added public release/community review rules and investigation notes for composer scroll behavior.
- Updated the README roadmap/status summary.
- Bumped plugin version to 1.6.1.

## Validation

- bun run test
- bun run build
